name: You Wanted a Cute Demi-Human Girl, But You Got a Real Devil
description:
Your country has a wonderful program called "Adopt a Demi-Human," and of course you wanted to use it to get a cute cat-girl or dog-girl, or maybe even a fox-girl with a huge fluffy tail... but when your demi-human arrived, it turned out to be... a Tasmanian Devil??? What the hell, where did such demi-humans even come from??? And now you need to decide - to handle this "devil" or, like a pathetic, weak, worthless loser, give up on her (ewww, don't be that guy).

-

Two Intros:

1. Tazzy arrives at your home (first meeting)

2.You and Tazzy have been living together for a week, but your relationship is still a strained

-

FAQ & Author's Ramblings

Hey everyone! Well, whether this turns into fluff or angst is up to you 😊

-

• I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me.
• I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.
• All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.
• I am not a native English speaker.
creator: RanceX
